name: edupath-ai
description: EduPath AI - Adaptive Learning Platform untuk SMA

scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
